rag_rules: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the AADL model.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
Align helper declaration types with the types of the expressions they represent.
Delete AGREE clauses that reference unresolved AADL properties or timing attributes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` with proper AGREE syntax.
Place type contract assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference identifiers or types that are not visible or declared in the same AGREE annex.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
